race.description: The Third Australian General Hospital Hcp (Bm78)
race.comment: WOOTTON LASS (11) fifth-up for this and gets her chance to tick off the 1200m box. Snagged back from the wide gate and chipped away late with a respectable eighth in the G3 PJ Bell Stakes over 1200m at this track. Maps well and is going better than her price suggests. CANTIAMO (6) above average filly who gripped on strongly second-up with a handy sixth over 1200m in the G3 PJ Bell Stakes at this track. Tongue-tie goes on and comes here in peak condition. Leading contender. JELLICIOUS (2) knocked up late with a tough on-pace second over 1100m at Rosehill. Comes to hand quickly and assess on her narrow second to Weeping Woman last November. ERNAUX (12) well placed with the claim after being trapped off the track with a poor last over this track and trip in the G3 P J Bell. Kept up to the mark with a 900m trial win. Don't dismiss. MADRINA (8) improving mare who returned good figures first-up. Stays in the mix. The chances don't end there.
